## Epic 8 — Polish & Build (#90)

**Dependency:** None
**Est. Effort:** Small

### Goal
Write chapter 00 — Front Matter: copyright, credits, and legal notices.

### Content

- Playtester credits
- Artist credits (interior art by Bruce A. Moser)

- Copyright notice
- Open Game License or custom license reference
- "First printing" placeholder
- Dedication (optional)
